hero.headline: Certified Export Spices, Ready to Ship
hero.subheadline: Areca nut, nutmeg, cloves, and candlenut from our North Sumatra warehouse — shipped from Belawan Port with full export documents.

about.title: About JefendiSpice
about.p1: JefendiSpice is a spice exporter — not a farmer, but a trading partner that collects and selects the best harvests from growers across North Sumatra. We focus on one thing: making sure the spices you order match your specifications, arrive on time, and are ready to ship.
about.p2: We run a network of warehouses in North Sumatra with official export licenses and direct access to Belawan Port. Every bag is sorted, sun-dried, and moisture-checked before it enters the container, so you receive consistent quality in every shipment.
about.p3: For international buyers, trust is built on proof. We are ready to show you our stock over a video call, send samples on request, and complete every shipment with a phytosanitary certificate and a certificate of origin. You know exactly what you are buying before you pay.

cengkeh.name: Cloves
cengkeh.description: Hand-selected dried cloves with minimal stems and a strong aroma. Sought by importers in India and the Middle East for the cigarette, seasoning, and clove-oil industries.
cengkeh.cta: Ask for clove stock & pricing on WhatsApp

pala.name: Nutmeg
pala.description: Dried whole nutmeg with high oil content, sorted between sound and shrivel grades. Sourced by importers for culinary spice, pharmaceutical, and oleoresin use.
pala.cta: Ask for nutmeg stock & pricing on WhatsApp

pinang.name: Areca (Betel) Nut
pinang.description: Sun-dried split areca nut with an even reddish-brown color. In high demand from importers in India, Pakistan, and Bangladesh for the chewing and herbal industries.
pinang.cta: Ask for areca nut stock & pricing on WhatsApp

kemiri.name: Candlenut
kemiri.description: Shelled whole candlenut with a low broken rate and a clean cream color. Used for culinary paste, cosmetics, and oil across South Asian markets.
kemiri.cta: Ask for candlenut stock & pricing on WhatsApp

items.title: Complete Export Documents

items.title: Direct Belawan Port Access

contact.headline: Start With a Sample or a Full Container?
